description: Enterprise-grade, type-enforced state management for Leptos (Rust). Structured SSR-safe architecture inspired by Vuex/Pinia with stores, getters, mutators, actions, hydration, middleware, persistence, composition, and devtools.
rules: leptos-store enforces the Enterprise Mode pattern: getters are public read-only, mutators are private, actions are the only public write API
Only mutators can write state - this is the core architectural invariant
Use the store! macro for complete store definitions with state, getters, mutators, and actions
Use `this` instead of `self` in store! macro bodies due to Rust 2024 edition macro hygiene
The `hydrate` feature is opt-in because it adds serde + web-sys (~50KB WASM) - only enable for full SSR apps
For SSR hydration: server uses provide_hydrated_store(), client uses use_hydrated_store()
State types for hydration must derive Clone, Debug, Default, Serialize, Deserialize
Always provide stores via provide_store() in a parent component before use_store() in children
